steps.title: Expand the equivalent form
steps.content:
Distribute $ry^4$ across both terms in the parentheses:
$$
ry^4(9y-6)=9ry^5-6ry^4
$$

steps.title: Match the coefficients
steps.content: Since the expressions are equivalent, the coefficient of $y^5$ must match the coefficient in $63y^5-42y^4$: $$ 9r=63 $$ $$ r=7 $$ The answer is 7.
